description: Character collider world link is a component that allows for having a user trigger a world link when they collide against a collider or go into a trigger zone.

fields.TriggersOnly: Whether to only allow collision events from trigger type colliders on this slot to trigger or all types of colliders to trigger this world link.
fields.OpenOnContactStart: Use world link on contact start.
fields.OpenOnContactStay: Use world link on contact stay.
fields.OpenOnContactEnd: Use world link on contact end.
fields.WorldLink: The world to open and optionally go to to on contact.
fields.LastOpened: Last time this world link was used.
